items.question: Does it sync across all my devices?
items.answer: Yes, with iCloud, all your reminders stay in sync across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Apple Vision Pro automatically.

items.question: Can I use Siri to create reminders?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can use Siri to create reminders with your voice, or use natural language typing within the app.

items.question: Can I collaborate with others?
items.answer: Yes, you can share lists with others and assign specific reminders to people you're collaborating with.

footer.tagline: The easiest way to stay organized.

privacy:
# Privacy Policy
Last updated: May 9, 2026

## 1. Introduction
At Reminders, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data when you use the Reminders app and our synchronization services.

## 2. Data Synchronization and iCloud
Reminders uses iCloud to keep your reminders in sync across all your devices. Your data is stored in your private iCloud database and is not accessible by us. Encryption ensures that your tasks, lists, and attachments remain secure during transit and while at rest.

## 3. Location-Based Reminders
If you choose to use location-based reminders, Reminders will access your location data. This information is processed locally on your device to trigger notifications when you arrive at or leave a specific place. We do not track or store your location history on our servers.

## 4. Collaboration and Shared Lists
When you share a list with others, participants can see the reminders, subtasks, and attachments within that list. Your name and contact information associated with your account may be visible to other participants in the shared list to facilitate collaboration.

## 5. Waitlist Information
For users joining our waitlist, we collect your email address solely to provide updates on app availability and beta testing opportunities. We do not sell or share this information with third parties.

## 6. Your Choices
You can manage your data by editing or deleting reminders directly in the app. You can also disable iCloud sync or location permissions in your device settings at any time.
terms:
# Terms of Service
Last updated: May 9, 2026

## 1. Acceptance of Terms
By using the Reminders application or website, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

## 2. Use of Service
You are responsible for any content you create within Reminders. You must not use the service for any illegal or unauthorized purposes. For collaborative features, you agree to respect the privacy and data of other participants.

## 3. Syncing and Third-Party Services
Reminders relies on third-party services like iCloud for data synchronization. We are not responsible for any service interruptions or data loss caused by these third-party providers.

## 4. Intellectual Property
All software, designs, and brand assets associated with Reminders are the exclusive property of Reminders Inc. and its licensors.

## 5. Termination
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these terms or is harmful to other users.

## 6. Changes to Terms
We may update these terms from time to time. Your continued use of the service after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
